name: Kelly Loeffler
subject: Are you ready to fight?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
body:
I am ready for a battle and I know it's one we can win. The left has declared it their mission to take Georgia and change America. We can't let them succeed.
[](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/57001639:sUPpY9KNd:m:1:1155937413:4CA7015F0ECE442EF95C3442A7342B59:r)
_****_
Peter,

I am ready for a battle and I know it's one we can win.

The left has declared it their mission to take Georgia and change America. **We can 't let them succeed. **

The fact is they will change our Nation and it won't be America anymore. They will toss aside our Constitution, our rights and freedoms, and bend their knee to their special interest groups. This battle is for the foundations of America itself. That will always be something worth fighting for.
_****_
[**HELP FIGHT BACK IN GEORGIA**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/57001639:sUPpY9KNd:m:1:1155937413:4CA7015F0ECE442EF95C3442A7342B59:r)
---

The left will lecture you all day about equality and fairness but when they are in power, they consistently use everything at their disposal to ignore the American people and institute their radical agenda. Make no mistake, if they take control of the Senate, they will try to pack the Supreme Court, push the Green New Deal, open the borders, and restrict your 2nd Amendment rights.

[**I need your help in this fight and we can 't waste a moment thinking about it.**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/57001639:sUPpY9KNd:m:1:1155937413:4CA7015F0ECE442EF95C3442A7342B59:r)

As we speak, the left is raising millions from their New York and California liberal elite donors. They don't care about America and they certainly don't care about Georgia.

We must stop them, and we must fight back. I hope you'll stand with me!

Thank you,

Kelly Loeffler
_****_
[**FIGHT BACK**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/57001639:sUPpY9KNd:m:1:1155937413:4CA7015F0ECE442EF95C3442A7342B59:r)
---

Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
---

Federal Multi candidate PAC's may contribute $5,000 per election.
Federal law requires that Georgians for Kelly Loeffler use best efforts to report the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in an election cycle.
Contributions to Georgians for Kelly Loeffler are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.
Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals who are not lawfully admitted for permanent residence, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Contributions are subject to federal contribution limits.

name: Senate Conservatives
subject: The Choice in Georgia
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY
body:
http://email.vervemail.com/p/vJd_NJ8uNN

[Senate Conservatives Fund]

Peter:

The outcome of the two runoff elections in Georgia will determine
control of the U.S. Senate and possibly whether there is any
check at all to slow the Democrats' push for socialism in
America.

The choice in these two runoff elections is clear.

Consider the radical positions held by the Democrats:

❌ JON OSSOFF (D-GA) supports repealing President Trump's tax
cuts, cozying up to China, ending the legislative filibuster, and
dismantling the Second Amendment.

❌ RAPHAEL WARNOCK (D-GA) has attacked law enforcement,
supports trillion-dollar tax increases, defended anti-Semitic
pastor Jeremiah Wright, and praised Communist leader Fidel
Castro.

The views held by these liberals are very dangerous and cannot be
allowed to win terms in the Senate.

Conservatives must work together to push Senators DAVID
PERDUE (R-GA) and KELLY LOEFFLER (R-GA) on to victory.

PLEASE MAKE A CONTRIBUTION TO THEIR CAMPAIGNS TODAY.
(HTTPS://SECURE.SENATECONSERVATIVES.COM/LWM32/D?C=903AA242539E7A4EBDB5D38BAA0CA029)

_SCF pays all processing fees so these candidates can spend 100%
of your donation on voter contact._

Senators Perdue and Loeffler will stand up to the liberals in
Washington and fight to stop higher taxes, wasteful spending,
state bailouts, amnesty for illegal immigrants, and attacks on
our right to keep and bear arms.

But they need your support to overcome the avalanche of liberal
money pouring into the campaigns of their opponents.

_TIME IS RUNNING SHORT. _Early in-person voting begins December
14 and the race will be concluded on January 5.

CONTRIBUTE TO DAVID PERDUE AND KELLY LOEFFLER NOW!
(HTTPS://SECURE.SENATECONSERVATIVES.COM/LWM32/D?C=903AA242539E7A4EBDB5D38BAA0CA029)

The election system in Georgia has serious vulnerabilities that
must be addressed, but failing to fight for these Senate seats
will guarantee defeat and give Chuck Schumer control of the
Senate.

Every freedom-loving American must answer the call to win these
races and create a firewall for freedom in the Senate.

Thank you for considering this request and for doing so much to
help fight for conservative leadership in Washington.

Sincerely,

[Mary Vought Signature]

Mary Vought

Executive Director

Senate Conservatives Fund

EARLY VOTING COUNTDOWN

[motionmailapp.com]

SUPPORT THESE CANDIDATES TODAY

[2020 Georgia Runoff Candidates]
SAVE THE SENATE
(https://secure.senateconservatives.com/lwm32/d?c=903aa242539e7a4ebdb5d38baa0ca029)

Senate Conservatives Fund
300 Independence Ave SE
Washington, DC 20003

Senate Conservatives Fund is a grassroots organization that
promotes conservative policies and helps elect conservative
candidates to the U.S. Senate. SCF was founded by former Senator
Jim DeMint to help the grassroots change Washington.

Contributions to the Senate Conservatives Fund are not deductible
as charitable contributions. Contributions from corporations or
foreign nationals lacking permanent resident status are not
permitted. Federal law requires us to report the name, mailing
address, occupation and employer for each individual whose
contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a calendar year. Not
paid for at taxpayer expense.

PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY
CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. SENATECONSERVATIVES.COM

body:
Democrats spent millions trying to defeat me, but luckily thanks to your support we had the resources necessary to fight back and win!

I recently won one of the most competitive House races in the country thanks to patriots like you.

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: We only get one chance at this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC

**_ALERT: The Georgia runoff elections are in just 30 days! _**[_**Help the GOP close the gap now >>**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hUYiTqGFd8-ZP_F4xzS93sAiHx1KSBad1uJlatSVkQEn7JYDsmvbdWZzj-Ei9bIie43dCFpM8u2g5dwvCj9aKV_pBbCfk2RzBA5c98FtJYBNthnMC6yYaERoAGQ03Nn3wcl3Ea9AGJ0Vhf3LPFYq94nWdLp49ddidhmCZX78Tstz5PY87PhdybuN-nuLH8Te2eG0R0QnALoZ8gU9nzccO-fawyU5qKCQzRfUn9y8w-WpcM0NWdz1FUiciorInbLS-pLfghBMxK0USWAoOPx6tA7M8LJyZKbMz8ASFkO3ZwUnOt7gFMSzr-44_J5VNDF4twUx3j_AQLCFkOvvSHXauAkFIKfmIUq305sD5l3hHsYN24fWqffjFtRGorXXYgWaOXUTXdv1sneyyaumuawdUQvh5MfUSNe1qI9DxWlsHfM=&c=MGUDSkPJ3YdXsNNPPALUA3k18PM714XQtvEBFAJwgwX41hm_m-ekvQ==&ch=DZ3iS6KkZhekpufAKFHPl7jv7Km-4eHp25Kkba7DcP8QYBBGkYo4kg==)

name: Marco Rubio
subject: The clock is ticking, and David Perdue needs your help

body:
Friend, **January 5th is right around the corner.**

Senator David Perdue is doing all he can to win Georgia and our Senate Majority, but with the clock ticking, he needs all the help he can get.

_**The Georgia Senate runoff race is the deciding factor for our nation 's future and there's so much on the line.**_

If David loses his Senate seat, we can say goodbye to all of our conservative accomplishments under a Republican-controlled Senate. **But with your help TODAY,**[**we can ensure David gets across the finish line.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015PYtKk0XFB94mUFBj3yRDcTiWWeeKpB_UCTqjMwrrgkqNwAiUgq4velQUweR7E_VzJ_50X0UqMbbRWjOIOc7uXF084Wc3J_B2oiBXidIy52dSDQr9RvL3EUljYNraLXOXpPvDB_mLbJW81XFfO0BR6CFH6IS0vuxiK-jcJtI1Lod6pVnli8_pMycDN2pTtZZr81iQyIdSj8P-Lop8rcY7fTNeGwJdaM-wqh_MyyAVr1J0kFOOyRoHuvg18jRqekPHJ4VJtBFlLrfbEQa9UGug2rVz2kaomYn3Sm1VP7mrNagdzjB-5IEYHTyKMEAv2SVEoB7jVM6SOwDFI6oYlMpyqdCM4woWffrbFZCkLjCqK6zASe_HTr0JYgvuitpykQSEr1b2RlC6ZzSWknIk453k-J2jb2GcHvFgcMNoi_Kdn1zPSLlFumlvTuVdijzAw-EwmIcHHxDQNNepP-RrkKnhobRCTjfQKhVDb3kW9KkKZ0=&c=Ax6EitzjUc8KI8n3SNXyH6pqUoMvbLvj6z1XDvWIxLDZAsp5XTSSRw==&ch=Et6LXzJxRFzNLMAFv8ENeMArXQD5bjxUkdTwn1_4rDvB62-q4JQstQ==)

clean_body: Friend, January 5th is right around the corner. Senator David Perdue is doing all he can to win Georgia and our Senate Majority, but with the clock ticking, he needs all the help he can get. The Georgia Senate runoff race is the deciding factor for our nation 's future and there's so much on the line. If David loses his Senate seat, we can say goodbye to all of our conservative accomplishments under a Republican-controlled Senate. But with your help TODAY,== == == == == == == Without your help, Friend, Democrats will not only take Georgia this January, but our Senate Majority as well. We cannot let that happen. == With only 30 days left in his fight, there 's no time to wait. Our future is on the line here, Friend. Thank you, Marco Rubio Republican U.S Senator for Florida Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate P.O. Box 661537 Miami, FL 33266 ==

body:
It can happen in the near-future.
Friend, you saw this past year just how radical the Democratic Party has become. They want to:
* Defund the police and leave American families exposed
* Tax the middle class out of existence with a Green New Deal
* Keep Americans locked in our homes, _**and they even want to cancel Christmas**_

Congressional redistricting will begin in 2021, and Democrats are aching for the chance to gerrymander our legislative maps in their favor. If that were to happen, they would have an unstoppable House majority for the next decade.
A lot can happen in the next ten years, and judging by just how radical Democrats have become in 2020, **it could mean ousting Nancy Pelosi as "too moderate" and electing Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez as Speaker of the House. **

body:
We don't want a Joe Biden future. | My father is counting on YOU
to step up and defend the Election from Joe Biden and his BIG
GOVERNMENT SOCIALIST policies.

Peter,

Are you busy?

My father is counting on YOU
to step up and defend the Election from Joe Biden and his BIG
GOVERNMENT SOCIALIST policies.

If the Left STEALS the
Election, they will RAISE your taxes on DAY ONE.

82% of Americans will see
their taxes go up and their 401k's destroyed. In addition to
RUINING the economy, Biden also wants to ban fracking, DEFUND the
Police, and use YOUR tax dollars to provide welfare for illegal
immigrants.

Make no mistake, Joe Biden is
100% controlled by the Radical Left-wing MOB. YOU are the only
one who can SAVE AMERICA, Peter. This is YOUR FIGHT, and my
father is calling on YOU to step up.

Please contribute $45 RIGHT
NOW to stand with President Trump and to SAVE AMERICA from BIG
GOVERNMENT SOCIALISTS. >>

CONTRIBUTE $250 = $2750

CONTRIBUTE $100 = $1100

CONTRIBUTE $50 = $550

CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT

It's clear that Patriotic
Americans don't want a Joe Biden future with high taxes, no rule
of law, and BIG GOVERNMENT SOCIALIST policies.

The question is, are YOU
going to do something about it, Peter?

Contribute ANY AMOUNT
IMMEDIATELY to fight for your Country.

Thank you,

Eric Trump

purposes.

for all that you do!

name: Stephen Lawson (Team Kelly)
subject: KELLY LOEFFLER DOMINATES IN DEBATE AGAINST RADICAL RAPHAEL WARNOCK
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE SUNDAY, DECEMBER 6, 2020 KELLY LOEFFLER DOMINATES IN ATLANTA PRESS CLUB DEBATE
ATLANTA - Tonight, conservative businesswoman and political outsider Kelly Loeffler emerged as the clear winner of the Atlanta Press Club's runoff debate - handily defeating radical liberal Raphael Warnock. To view highlights from the debate, click the photo below.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xEu_Utp1Hf_yHphZ94QlyZggJOoQVkw8NklvUUKR_eWon280YLJKbrapU2-Dnn6NaA6N0CW2Ah5A5eA40s8i0LKcoE-dWkEX2ijokSoFfNlusYoTxE07dJc3WOMbI9o1-f1jKr6Z124RArfRdK2wRK08sYDS9H8JR2fe2UD559aYWGb_EUSR-tvCZ54IwH1xqCwYnj3_WUU=&c=8vKX6lBIuEZwCkNcKWEuPhNle603uzR_VPlY-jPHbk3qQ-oj1kCXBw==&ch=2j71uHtf84RmsUml1wieJhjO10rz_E62Qva7HLu4u4AU_S_3CmVHfQ==)
---
| "It was four on one, and Kelly Loeffler still easily won tonight's debate. While Kelly outlined her record of results in delivering for Georgia, Raphael Warnock was exposed time and time again for his radical, far-left agenda that would destroy our economy, raise taxes, and turn our country into a socialist nation. Not only does he support socialized healthcare, the Green New Deal, and higher taxes on Georgia families - he would vote alongside Chuck Schumer to defund the police, pack the courts, open our borders, make D.C. a state, and pass abortion-on-demand," said Deputy Campaign Manager Stephen Lawson. "Kelly Loeffler is the only candidate Georgians can trust to defend their conservative values against radicals like Warnock - and most importantly, she is the only candidate we can trust to reopen the economy, bring back jobs, protect health care, and defend school choice. As a political outsider and successful businessperson, Kelly Loeffler will continue delivering results that move our state forward and protect the American Dream for generations to come."
---
| ###
Stephen Lawson Deputy Campaign Manager [stephen@kellyforsenate.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xEu_Utp1Hf_yHphZ94QlyZggJOoQVkw8NklvUUKR_eWon280YLJKbvjz4kiKSPiBmx1Nq_7-eiAM8F6pxDIHwOspoDST6IvjkbdUPPhhuN4BfYF7H2Jdu-SQ0qTXxyvsTnQFfm5YeQWJjRen_k5przS7zZ_pJQ42&c=8vKX6lBIuEZwCkNcKWEuPhNle603uzR_VPlY-jPHbk3qQ-oj1kCXBw==&ch=2j71uHtf84RmsUml1wieJhjO10rz_E62Qva7HLu4u4AU_S_3CmVHfQ==)
---
|

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: This is a Big Week
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_is_a_big_week&n=1)
---
Peter \-- **This is a big week for our liberty! Let me explain.** I'm sure you've seen the heroic acts of Larvita McFarquhar by now. A single mother of four is courageously standing up to Governor Walz by refusing to obey his illegal and unconstitutional orders. Her business remains open! Larvita's leadership against tyranny is starting to get noticed around the country. This morning she was on Fox & Friends for a second time to share her story: [](https://www.action4liberty.com/larvita_on_fox_friends_2?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_is_a_big_week&n=2) Government bullies have stripped Larivita of her food license, threatened her with jail time and are looking to arrest her for operating a legal business. But she WON'T BACK DOWN! This courageous act of defiance is already spreading to other areas of the state. We met with another patriot named Jane who plans to open her Boardwalk Bar & Grill in East Grand Forks on Wednesday. Jane saw the ridiculousness of Walz' illegal orders that allow big box stores to be open. She told me that across the border in North Dakota, businesses is booming. And it's killing East Grand Forks. I know what Jane means. Last night I took a trip over to Hudson, WI to feel normal again but couldn't get a table anywhere. There were three hour wait times and a sea of Minnesota license plates. Are you kidding me?! **Walz is a destroyer of jobs and businesses. And it's time this nonsense ends. So we stand with Larvita, Jane and all other businesses who will defy Governor Walz.** But the big question remains: will our elected legislators stand with them as well? This week Governor Walz will extend his abusive emergency powers for another 30 days. That means the legislature will be called back. You may remember that in November, right after the election, the Republican Senate refused to vote on the End Walz' Emergency Powers Resolution when they met. Before we could even work on getting four more Democrats in the House, they adjourned sine die, thus protecting Walz' power for another month. Instead of assuring us that they will bring forward a vote on the End Walz' Emergency Powers Resolution this week, Senate Republicans are busy cutting deals with Democrats on a shutdown bailout bill. They want to make YOU pay for the Governor's illegal shutdown. Can you believe that?! We absolutely MUST bring the heat on these legislators. It's time they stand with their constituents and not our tyrannical governor. But we need your help to get our message out to more Minnesotans. | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_is_a_big_week&n=3 "DONATE NOW") [DONATE NOW](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_is_a_big_week&n=4)
---
Where are the courageous state senators at the Capitol who are willing to stand up for Larvita, Jane and the rest of their constituents? The Republican controlled Senate thinks they can avoid voting on Ending Walz' Emergency Powers when they meet again in December. What a shame!
We must put the pressure on legislators to END these Illegal Emergency Powers once and for all! Action 4 Liberty has the best infrastructure for mobilizing activists and bringing the heat on the political class. We put our money where are mouth is, and simply REFUSE to fail.
This week is critical to the battle. As our legislators are crafting a shutdown bailout bill, we must get our voice out to more Minnesotans and grow a larger army of patriots. We can't do that without your support.
**Please equip us with the resources to continue growing this massive army of Minnesotans. There's power in numbers. The larger we grow, the more scared the political class will become. Can you help us out?**
## [HELP US GROW THE ARMY](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_is_a_big_week&n=5)
**In Liberty,

**
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
**P.S. The courageous act of defiance by Larvita is starting to spread around the state. But legislators in St Paul are refusing to stand with her and their constituents. Now they want to pass a shutdown bailout bill. Are you kidding me? Action 4 Liberty needs your help to get the message out to more Minnesotans.[Please support us with a $100 donation. If that's too much, $25 or $50](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_is_a_big_week&n=6) goes a long way to spreading the message to End Walz' Emergency Powers once and for all.**
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_is_a_big_week&n=7).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_is_a_big_week&n=8).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=this_is_a_big_week&n=9), software for leaders.

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Weekend Recap: Pause Week Two, Vaccine Planning, and the Central Providence Opportunities Initiative
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
Cases are continuing to rise, and it's more important than ever that we all stay informed. Please, stay home except for essential activities, and wear a mask anytime you're with people you don't live with. Together, we can turn our case numbers around.
If you know someone who needs a way to stay up-to-date on the latest measures Rhode Island is taking to stop the spread of COVID-19, please encourage them to sign up for these emails through this link: [lp.constantcontactpages.com/su/eYMG9tf](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QL8BqC3NZCjkHDrcYyYBDmI4OMATJ3c8d10HczDH3oBEjKoX3a-Wxe5U3BMOFPcA5JcXJrgyt_ZMv4cmU_K6y-yTBitv6AcElTGeC85cJxf1UQROqFqBS3q4wmwc3HuFRdpypwRIWi0PJseIIn08UJkHvaQtbikiT7m6-KmexWnAFbRZtj-nGFDr9kviwb_4_85FQkHsnuCFMv20AtZhyPD0INBMB4mdlYszuEOpyVeBLJbug-73OPgCUBT8fPAgeWUog_SHg-Qeaj8kthrE-5OdhBTnkBIJ6WXLkkHV902Rh1XwYacm7MfNajTZhGipLs5Vz08LvIA=&c=0GKqTeSoWibvHDcltIy-kJ8bIyrnX4azhR8eZUDXvBpMVoM2ahgAUw==&ch=heqFMGlQwWDj_mLXKZpAVeMQMGHmCWjcOGscCuAiPgKaocEJYhaOkg==). The better we all stay informed, the better we'll be able to keep ourselves, our families, and our friends safe from COVID-19.
---
| | |
---|---
|
PAUSE WEEK TWO
We're entering the second week of our pause. It hasn't been easy, but Rhode Islanders once again showed that we are up to the challenge. It's clear that people have followed our guidance. Over Thanksgiving week, our COVID enforcement unit did not receive any credible calls about parties or large gatherings. In about 700 business inspections over the past week, we saw excellent compliance with the new regulations. And in the past seven days, we have seen a significant drop in traffic, which means that many people heeded the message to stay home unless necessary.

Thank you, Rhode Island, for the sacrifices you've made to help us reduce the demand on our hospitals and our healthcare workers. We still have a ways to go, but your actions have helped to protect the lives of all Rhode Islanders. Keep it up and continue to stay home as much as possible through the end of the pause.
| | |
---|---
|
VACCINE PLANNING

There has been a lot of good news on the COVID-19 vaccine front over the last few weeks. When we have a vaccine that the doctors, researchers, and scientists tell us is safe, we'll be ready to distribute it as quickly as is safely possible.

I want to be very clear: the vaccine is going to come into Rhode Island over the course of months, not weeks. It's a marathon, not a sprint. From our planning conversations with our federal partners and the manufacturers, we anticipate receiving 29,000 doses total in December. That's not going to flip the switch on COVID-19 in Rhode Island overnight, but if we stay serious about following the rules now, we can all look forward to a time next year when COVID-19 is in the rear-view mirror.

To hear more about our vaccine planning, you can watch this quick [eight-minute video](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QL8BqC3NZCjkHDrcYyYBDmI4OMATJ3c8d10HczDH3oBEjKoX3a-WxT81qSeFfkUwa_rO49pC_UZ_KJTSzVVOFqHkV7AWTpQ_wIt1aDjVQpJqnMKAme44iALLCrJOmHbbD0bx6AXTUhktKv-NlxD3E43c5PUE4BUmB-oB-z5K0Ms=&c=0GKqTeSoWibvHDcltIy-kJ8bIyrnX4azhR8eZUDXvBpMVoM2ahgAUw==&ch=heqFMGlQwWDj_mLXKZpAVeMQMGHmCWjcOGscCuAiPgKaocEJYhaOkg==).
| | |
---|---
|
CENTRAL PROVIDENCE OPPORTUNITIES INITIATIVE

We had another spot of good news this week on a project we've been working on since before COVID-19. Rhode Island has been awarded an $8 million grant to pilot community-based initiatives in ZIP codes 02908 and 02909 in Central Providence. We're calling this the Central Providence Opportunities initiative.

This initiative will improve economic opportunities for the residents of these ZIP codes by building affordable housing, expanding access to childcare and Pre-K, and creating apprenticeship programs and small business supports.

These ZIP code have some of the highest COVID-19 case rates in Rhode Island -- but it isn't just about 02909 and 02908. This work will be a model for the type of change we want to see across the state. Once we know how to make the biggest impact, we'll scale the most successful policies and programs statewide to combat economic inequality in every corner of the state.
| I hope you find this recap helpful. Please, remember your three W's: wear a mask, wash your hands, and watch your distance. Together, we can stop the rising case numbers and save lives if we just band together now and follow the rules.
I'll be back on TV with more updates Thursday at 1 p.m.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QL8BqC3NZCjkHDrcYyYBDmI4OMATJ3c8d10HczDH3oBEjKoX3a-Wxe5U3BMOFPcAlLQAGh9hhGZXRknAVFzPHDYb-2l59vnaxFOr3ixway0-g6tgT7JGd6vg6GQGNpreUrEUxZdAm2UY-3L-8V7MlWe1xIFwUABzlyZOfjIgVu7FSVxi2KHgaug4CdA18bkwwMegtOcOSm1DRUIJ9wu-RSI5Fo86Zgp32yUMyDfckNDKD_boHqw_FDsyjlMR1_hk1_Z2gEg4zphDSCZ9Bj8kP9_8s7Eo6mHn6GCUuaXSQmsBAWwcwGt_saMeWTXwi7RiRPtOTOh5ExU=&c=0GKqTeSoWibvHDcltIy-kJ8bIyrnX4azhR8eZUDXvBpMVoM2ahgAUw==&ch=heqFMGlQwWDj_mLXKZpAVeMQMGHmCWjcOGscCuAiPgKaocEJYhaOkg==).
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903
